title: The Invisible Guest
tmdbOverview: Barcelona, Spain. Adrián Doria, a young and successful businessman accused of murder, meets one night with Virginia Goodman, an expert interrogation lawyer, in order to devise a defense strategy.
synopsis: Released in 2017, The Invisible Guest is a drama, mystery and thriller film from Spain. It's highly rated, holding a strong 8.0 on IMDb. It appears on several of our curated Top 10 lists. It carries a 13 certification (AR rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
